title: Craftable Slime for Fabric
description: Craft Slime from organic material with new items and recipes
body:
Tired of searching for slime chunks?
Dislike ugly mob farms?
Want to be able to craft slime?
Then this mod is for you!

Craft slime from different organic materials and water

Gelatin and Agar are new items
Gelatin is obtainable by burning leather hide or bones in a furnace.
Agar is obtainable by burning red coral in a furnace.

This mod requires Polymer API

This mod is designed to work on Fabric servers without its players downloading
